## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm -r --if-present run test`
- [ ] Other check, if relevant:

## Source/limitations check

- [ ] No civic source/content/data/methodology changed.
- [ ] Civic source/content/data/methodology changed and the PR documents:
  - source URL/type or registry reference;
  - retrieval/update date or update logic;
  - verification status;
  - limitations/caveats;
  - whether human review is required.

## Civic and legal-copy safeguard

- [ ] The PR does not present indicators as proof of wrongdoing, corruption, favouritism, mafia infiltration or individual responsibility.
- [ ] Public-facing copy remains factual, cautious, non-accusatory and non-partisan.
- [ ] Red-flag or scouting material distinguishes facts, allegations, missing data, interpretations and human-gated decisions.

## Zero-cost automation check

- [ ] No paid runners, larger runners, GPU runners, self-hosted runners, Codespaces prebuilds or paid external services were introduced.
- [ ] Any executable GitHub Actions workflow uses `runs-on: ubuntu-latest`.
- [ ] No high-frequency scheduled workflow was introduced.

## Human Decision Ledger

- **Decision proposed:** MERGE ORA / REVIEW MANUALE / NON MERGIARE / ATTENDI
- **Reason:**
- **Risk:** low / medium / high
- **Impact on v0:** launch-blocker / launch-enabler / quality-enabler / backlog-only
- **What Giovanni must do:**
- **Next automated step:**
